name: EventHandler - ApplySkillToSelf
description: Verify ApplySkillToSelf EventHandler loads and can be read

steps.name: Find ApplySkillToSelf handler in array
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", "active.emp_discharge_small", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { var type = h.GetType().Name; if(type == "ApplySkillToSelf") { found = true; break; } } found

steps.name: Verify _type field readable
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", "active.emp_discharge_small", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { try { if(h.GetType().Name == "ApplySkillToSelf") { var typeField = h.GetType().GetField("_type"); if(typeField != null) { found = true; } break; } } catch {} } found

steps.name: Read SkillToApply parameter field
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", "active.emp_discharge_small", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { try { if(h.GetType().Name == "ApplySkillToSelf") { var field = h.GetType().GetField("SkillToApply"); if(field != null) { found = true; } break; } } catch {} } found
